title: Before Camp
excerpt: Along with the excitement about a Camp Barney summer comes the logistics. How will my children get to camp? What should they pack? Can I communicate with them during the summer? What if they need to take medicine while at camp? Rest assured that we have thought through all these details and more to ensure […]
contentHtml:
Along with the excitement about a Camp Barney summer comes the logistics. How will my children get to camp? What should they pack? Can I communicate with them during the summer? What if they need to take medicine while at camp?

Rest assured that we have thought through all these details and more to ensure every camper has a safe and fun summer, and every parent has the information they need to get their child camp ready and enjoy the time their child is at CBM. We highly recommend you read through our Parent Handbook. It has answers to the questions above, plus the questions you haven’t even thought about asking!

In addition, Camp Barney offers many opportunities for both new and returning families to explore camp, such as info sessions and tours.

Quick Links

  • Bunkmate Requests: Information on special requests and how they work
  • Getting to Camp / Camper Luggage: Make sure your child(ren) and their luggage arrive safely at camp
  • What To Bring/What Not To Bring: Everything you need (and don’t need) to make sure your child(ren) are prepared for camp
  • Trip Forms & Trip Waivers: Log into your CBM account.
  • Clothing Labels: Visit Label Daddy. You will receive a 15% CBM Discount and 10% of every purchase will go to the CBM Camp Scholarship Fund..
  • Buy a Brick: Buy a brick to help support Camp Barney Medintz
  • Healthy Campers: Our commitment to keeping your child(ren) safe and healthy

If you can’t find the answers you are looking for, click here to email us and we are happy to help!
